stanzas: <div>Vaanil Vanthe Vaanmathi Song Lyrics Album Songs
Vaanil vantha vanmathi

kadhal penne
kadhal penne
en manadhai thirudiyaval
neethaane

nee varum munne
adi en kanne
en vazhkai verum
puthir thaane

udhavuthaan niram
nee anindha seelai
en nenjai varum
indha maalai velai

undhan may maasam
irandu poojam poojam pattu
kel paarvathi
unakkaaga indha paatu

un babu guna
enakku vendum thinam
vinai varuda
viralgal enai varuda vendum
dhinam thendral un peyarai
solli theendum
nee mattum irundhaal
enakku podhum baby

vaanil vantha vaanmathi
uyir povathu un vazhiyil
oru kadhal kavithai
konjam solladi
kanavilum ninaivilum neeyadi

maranam jananam
adhu vandhaalum
en udalai uyir vittu
sendraalum
pala gandam thaandiye
naan varuven
un nizhalin koodave
vaazhven penne

vaanil vantha vaanmathi
uyir povathu un vazhiyil
oru kadhal kavithai
konjam solladi
kanavilum ninaivilum neeyadi

vizhiyil vilundha

uyiril kalandha
urave

kaadhal noiyai
theerkka vaada
enthan aaruyire

kadanthu sendra
antha yaezhuk kadalai
kaeladi
en kadhalin aalaththai
koorum unnidam thaanadi

valluvanukku vaasuki
Bharathiku kannammaa
ethanai jenmam vandhaalum
sivanin shakthi neeyammaa

vaanavil naan endraal
athan vannam neeyadi
akkarai cheemaiku sendral
thaedi varuven naanadi

kaatrodu kalandhu
varum kaadhal gaanathai
kaeladi
kadhil seidhi sollum
uyir ulla varai
I love you

poonguzhali un koondhalil

kan edhire kadhal sollum
vennilavum neeye neeye

en kanmani
kadhal arundhum thaeni
kadal thaandi vittu
sendra penmani
undhan azhagu vadivu
. sidhum kanivu
nilaikkum namadhu uravu
kalaiyaadha kanavu

meendum meendum
undhann niyabagam solluthe
yaengudhu thinam
manam thannanthaniye penne.

vaanil vantha vaanmathi
en kadhali neeyadi
uyirodu seradi
en nadai udai bavanai
maatriyaval neeyadi

un kaalgal aadum
baratham nadanam
en uyirai thudikka
vaikkum un
salangai oli satham
un idhal pesum
anbaana mutham

vaanil vantha vaanmathi

kayal vizhiye
iru manam serum neram.
idhaya mozhiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Vaanil Vanthe Vaanmathi expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotions of a lover waiting for their beloved.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie for Vaanil Vanthe Vaanmathi is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of this song?

The singer of Vaanil Vanthe Vaanmathi is currently unknown.

What year was the song released?

The song was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Vaanil Vanthe Vaanmathi beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. Its lyrics reflect the emotions of a lover who is deeply infatuated, creating a nostalgic atmosphere. The soothing melody enhances the romantic theme, making it perfect for intimate moments. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaanil Vanthe Vaanmathi is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With its enchanting lyrics and soothing tune, this song transports listeners to a world of romance and nostalgia. Experience the magic of this beautiful track that resonates with every heart yearning for love.
stanzaMeanings: The beauty that came from the sky.
Oh beloved, you are the one who stole my heart.
Before you come, my eyes are just a secret in my life.
You are the color that brightens my heart, this evening's work comes to my mind.
Your beauty is like a festival, listen to this song for you.
I need your qualities every day, my fate is tied to you. Just saying your name is enough for me, baby.
The beauty that came from the sky, a love poem is on your path, you are in my dreams and thoughts.
Whether it's life or death, even if my body leaves, I will come back crossing many obstacles, I will live in your shadow, my dear.
The beauty that came from the sky, a love poem is on your path, you are in my dreams and thoughts.
In the eyes, in the heart, a bond that connects our souls.
To cure the pain of love, oh my life.
Crossing the sea of troubles, listen to the call of love, it is with you.
For the wise, you are the strength of Shiva, no matter how many births, you are my dear.
If I say I am in the rainbow, you are its color. I will come searching for the sweet fruit.
Listen to the love song that comes from the wind, it says I love you until the end of life.
The beauty that came from the sky, a love poem is on your path, you are in my dreams and thoughts.
Whether it's life or death, even if my body leaves, I will come back crossing many obstacles, I will live in your shadow, my dear.
The beauty that came from the sky, a love poem is on your path, you are in my dreams and thoughts.
Oh beloved, will your hair play the music of love? You are the moon that speaks of love.
My dear, love is sweet like honey, your beauty is like a lovely form. Our bond should not break, it is a dream.
Again and again, your memory comes to me, where does my heart go every day, my dear?
The beauty that came from the sky, you are my beloved, you change my path.
Your feet dance in the Bharatanatyam, your voice brings my life to life, your sweet words speak love.
The beauty that came from the sky, a love poem is on your path, you are in my dreams and thoughts.
Whether it's life or death, even if my body leaves, I will come back crossing many obstacles, I will live in your shadow, my dear.
Your fish-like eyes and the time when our hearts meet. Your words are like a breeze, just one glance is enough to know love, my dear.
